idea-plugin.name: FaFaFaFa - Build Failure Sound
idea-plugin.description:
FaFaFaFa – Build Failure Sound Alert

Stop staring at your build like a microwave. FaFaFaFa plays a sound when your build fails, so you’ll know instantly when things go wrong.

Features

  • Plays a sound when a build fails
  • Works with IntelliJ IDEs
  • Use any WAV file (dramatic fail sound recommended xD)
  • Toggle on/off from Settings
  • Adjust volume

Usage

Install it, run a build, and go do something else. If the build fails, FaFaFaFa will let you know. Settings are under Settings → Tools → FaFaFaFa.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.1

  • Option to automatically focus the IDE window when a build fails
  • Minor improvements and fixes

1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Build failure sound notification
  • Configurable custom sound file
  • Support for internal compiler and external build systems
